chinese_tex_locations: thesis_zh.tex:91 || thesis_zh.tex:155 || thesis_zh.tex:157 || thesis_zh.tex:161 || thesis_zh.tex:163 || thesis_zh.tex:378 || thesis_zh.tex:380 || thesis_zh.tex:560
english_citation_sentences: On the modeling side, empirical correlations, phenomenological formulations, and CFD-based methods are commonly used to describe spray development \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,liu2020sprayreview}. || Mie scattering is useful for visualizing dense liquid sprays because it offers high temporal resolution and comparatively simple experimental implementation \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || The scattering response depends on droplet size, refractive index, wavelength, and viewing geometry, while dense regions introduce multiple scattering and shadowing \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Operational observables such as penetration, cone angle, projected area, and boundary location are therefore more defensible than claims about exact liquid distribution \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}. || Mie scattering is sensitive to forward and side scattering from liquid droplets, and thus provides high contrast at the liquid-phase boundary, making it well suited for extracting penetration depth and cone angle \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Mie imaging also exhibits a characteristic multiple-scattering effect: in the dense liquid-core region near the nozzle, multiple scattering and internal shadowing elevate the local intensity while producing little sharp directional structure, resulting in a diffuse halo rather than a clean plume boundary \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}. || This sequence is important for Mie videos because the raw intensity is not a direct measure of liquid volume fraction, and because the practical objective is stable geometry extraction under non-uniform illumination, glare, and background texture rather than exact optical inversion \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || These metrics matter because they turn each aligned strip into a compact geometric state vector; however, the downstream modeling in this thesis remains focused on penetration, which is the best-supported target in the archived notebooks \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 建模方面，经验关联式、现象学模型以及基于 CFD 的方法常用于描述喷雾发展 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,liu2020sprayreview}。 || Mie 散射适合用于可视化致密液相喷雾，因为它具有较高的时间分辨率，实验实现也相对简单 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 散射响应取决于液滴尺寸、折射率、波长和观测几何，而在致密区域中还会出现多重散射和阴影效应 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 相较于声称获得精确液相分布，穿深、锥角、投影面积和边界位置这类操作性观测量更具可辩护性 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}。 || Mie 散射的信号来自液相液滴的前向和侧向散射，因此对液相边界位置具有很高的敏感性，适合于液相穿深和液相锥角的提取 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || Mie 成像中存在一个特征性的多重散射问题：在靠近喷嘴的稠密液相区域，多次散射和内部遮蔽效应导致局部强度场整体抬高，形成亮度增加但几乎没有锐利方向结构的光晕区 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 这个序列对Mie视频很重要，因为原始强度不是液体体积分数的直接度量，而且实际目标是在非均匀照明、眩光和背景纹理下稳定几何提取，而不是精确的光学反演\cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 这就是为什么实现的流程使用来自预注入统计的鲁棒背景估计，然后将表示转换为边缘主导的Sobel特征，其几何响应比原始亮度幅度更稳定\cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 这些度量很重要，因为它们将每个对齐条带转换为紧凑的几何状态向量；然而，本论文中的下游建模仍然专注于穿深，这是存档笔记本中最支持的目标\cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the limits and usefulness of optical spray imaging and Mie-scattering diagnostics for extracting liquid-envelope observables.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑光学喷雾成像和 Mie 散射诊断的适用性及局限，说明液相包络只能作为操作性观测量解释。

title: Absorption and Scattering of Light by Small Particles

english_citation_sentences: The scattering response depends on droplet size, refractive index, wavelength, and viewing geometry, while dense regions introduce multiple scattering and shadowing \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Mie imaging also exhibits a characteristic multiple-scattering effect: in the dense liquid-core region near the nozzle, multiple scattering and internal shadowing elevate the local intensity while producing little sharp directional structure, resulting in a diffuse halo rather than a clean plume boundary \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Under high injection pressures, cavitation inside the nozzle can further alter the internal jet structure and affect atomization characteristics in ways that classical penetration correlations do not explicitly capture \cite{BohrenHuffman2004}. || This sequence is important for Mie videos because the raw intensity is not a direct measure of liquid volume fraction, and because the practical objective is stable geometry extraction under non-uniform illumination, glare, and background texture rather than exact optical inversion \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 散射响应取决于液滴尺寸、折射率、波长和观测几何，而在致密区域中还会出现多重散射和阴影效应 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || Mie 成像中存在一个特征性的多重散射问题：在靠近喷嘴的稠密液相区域，多次散射和内部遮蔽效应导致局部强度场整体抬高，形成亮度增加但几乎没有锐利方向结构的光晕区 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 此外，在高压喷射条件下，喷嘴内腔的高速液流可能诱发空化，改变出口射流的内部结构和雾化特性，但这一效应通常未被经典穿深关联式所显式考虑 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004}。 || 这个序列对Mie视频很重要，因为原始强度不是液体体积分数的直接度量，而且实际目标是在非均匀照明、眩光和背景纹理下稳定几何提取，而不是精确的光学反演\cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 这就是为什么实现的流程使用来自预注入统计的鲁棒背景估计，然后将表示转换为边缘主导的Sobel特征，其几何响应比原始亮度幅度更稳定\cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。
english_reference_meaning: Provides the scattering-physics basis for explaining why Mie intensity is not a direct liquid-volume-fraction measurement.

english_citation_sentences: In diesel spray research, penetration and cone angle remain standard descriptors precisely because they are interpretable and comparatively robust across controlled experimental campaigns \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}. || This CDF front is one of the main practical contributions of the workflow: it is much less sensitive to broken leading-edge pixels than a naive max-index definition, while still producing a penetration quantity aligned with standard diesel-spray usage \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 在柴油喷雾研究中，穿深和锥角之所以长期作为标准描述符，正是因为它们可解释，并且在受控实验研究中相对稳健 \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。 || 相比之下，本文采用的 CDF 前沿把穿深建立在逐喷油束整体前景支持分布之上，使结果不再由单个最远前景像素主导，而更接近“主要液相包络推进到何处”的几何含义 \cite{MagnottiGenzale2013,JohnsonNaberLee2012,Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。 || 这个CDF前沿是工作流的主要实用贡献：它比朴素的最大索引定义对断裂的边缘像素不那么敏感，同时仍然产生与标准柴油喷雾使用对齐的穿深量\cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。

title: Structures of Fuel Sprays in Diesel Engines
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.

chinese_tex_locations: thesis_zh.tex:93 || thesis_zh.tex:134 || thesis_zh.tex:202 || thesis_zh.tex:217 || thesis_zh.tex:230 || thesis_zh.tex:274 || thesis_zh.tex:668 || thesis_zh.tex:733 || thesis_zh.tex:761
english_citation_sentences: On the modeling side, empirical correlations, phenomenological formulations, and CFD-based methods are commonly used to describe spray development \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,liu2020sprayreview}. || To assess whether the surrogate adds value beyond available analytical approximations, predicted penetration trends are also placed in the context of classical scaling-law references such as the Hiroyasu--Arai two-stage model \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}, allowing the data-driven output to be interpreted against a physically grounded baseline. || In diesel spray research, penetration and cone angle remain standard descriptors precisely because they are interpretable and comparatively robust across controlled experimental campaigns \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}. || In simplified proportional form, \[ S_{\mathrm{tip}}(t)\propto \begin{cases} t, & t<t_b,\\ t^{1/2}, & t\ge t_b, \end{cases} \] where \(t_b\) is the breakup time and the prefactors depend on pressure difference, nozzle diameter, and fluid properties \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}. || In a common-rail injection system, the needle-valve opening and closing events are finite-time mechanical transients: before the needle is fully lifted, the effective flow area through the nozzle varies with time, directly affecting the instantaneous injection rate and the near-nozzle flow field \cite{StumppRicco1996,HiroyasuArai1990}. || This CDF front is one of the main practical contributions of the workflow: it is much less sensitive to broken leading-edge pixels than a naive max-index definition, while still producing a penetration quantity aligned with standard diesel-spray usage \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}. || It is a reduced-order, data-driven adaptation of the regime-change viewpoint used in diesel spray-penetration literature: Hiroyasu and Arai describe spray development in terms of changing penetration behavior across stages \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}, and later work on start-of-injection transients shows that short injections are difficult to represent well with one rigid empirical expression over the entire trace \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}. || The v2 surrogate replaces the four weakly supported pressure and diameter inputs with a single hard scaling group derived from the Hiroyasu--Arai post-breakup branch \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 建模方面，经验关联式、现象学模型以及基于 CFD 的方法常用于描述喷雾发展 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,liu2020sprayreview}。 || 为评估 surrogate 是否在现有解析近似之外提供了额外价值，本文还将预测穿深趋势与 Hiroyasu--Arai 两段式模型等经典标度律参考值并置比较 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}，从而在有物理基础的基准之上解读数据驱动输出。 || 在柴油喷雾研究中，穿深和锥角之所以长期作为标准描述符，正是因为它们可解释，并且在受控实验研究中相对稳健 \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。 || 在简化比例形式中， [ S_{\mathrm{tip}}(t)\propto \begin{cases} t, & t<t_b,\ t^{1/2}, & t\ge t_b, \end{cases} ] 其中\(t_b\)是破碎时间，前因子取决于压力差、喷嘴直径和流体特性\cite{HiroyasuArai1990}。 || 共轨喷射系统中，针阀的开启与关闭过程是有限时间的机械瞬态：在针阀完全抬起之前，有效喷嘴流通截面随时间变化，直接影响即时喷射率和近嘴处的流场结构 \cite{StumppRicco1996,HiroyasuArai1990}。 || 相比之下，本文采用的 CDF 前沿把穿深建立在逐喷油束整体前景支持分布之上，使结果不再由单个最远前景像素主导，而更接近“主要液相包络推进到何处”的几何含义 \cite{MagnottiGenzale2013,JohnsonNaberLee2012,Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。 || 这个CDF前沿是工作流的主要实用贡献：它比朴素的最大索引定义对断裂的边缘像素不那么敏感，同时仍然产生与标准柴油喷雾使用对齐的穿深量\cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。 || 它是柴油喷雾穿深文献中使用的分阶段变化观点的降阶、数据驱动适应：Hiroyasu和Arai描述喷雾发展在不同阶段的穿深行为变化\cite{HiroyasuArai1990}，后来关于起始注入瞬态的工作表明，短注入很难用一个刚性经验表达式在整个轨迹上表示\cite{ZhouLiYi2021}。 || v2 代理模型将四个弱支持的压力和直径输入替换为一个来自 Hiroyasu--Arai 破碎后分支的硬物理缩放群 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}。
english_reference_meaning: Provides the classical two-stage diesel-spray scaling law used as a physical baseline and as motivation for the surrogate scaling group.
chinese_reference_meaning: 提供经典两阶段柴油喷雾缩放关系，作为物理基线并支撑代理模型中的缩放群构造。

authors: Zhou, Xinyi and Li, Tie and Yi, Ping
title: Modeling of Diesel Spray Tip Penetration During Start-of-Injection Transients
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.
english_citation_sentences: In that study, the SOI stages were found to scale approximately as \(t^{3/2}\) initially, then \(t^{3/4}\), and only later approach the more familiar \(t^{1/2}\) behavior \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}. || This role is especially relevant for short pilot injections, where start-of-injection and end-of-injection transients already complicate the raw signal shape \cite{ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || Zhou et al.\ already show that short-injection penetration behavior is strongly transient and regime-dependent near SOI \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}; in the current project, those unresolved perturbations are not modeled mechanistically one by one, so it is reasonable to treat their combined effect as an input-dependent residual distribution whose variance changes with operating condition and time. || It is a reduced-order, data-driven adaptation of the regime-change viewpoint used in diesel spray-penetration literature: Hiroyasu and Arai describe spray development in terms of changing penetration behavior across stages \cite{HiroyasuArai1990}, and later work on start-of-injection transients shows that short injections are difficult to represent well with one rigid empirical expression over the entire trace \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 在该研究中，SOI阶段被发现大约以\(t^{3/2}\)最初，然后\(t^{3/4}\)，只有后来接近更熟悉的\(t^{1/2}\)行为\cite{ZhouLiYi2021}。 || 这个角色在短预喷注入中尤其重要，因为起始注入和结束注入瞬态已经使原始信号形状复杂化\cite{ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || Zhou等人已经表明，短注入穿深行为在SOI附近强烈瞬态和阶段依赖\cite{ZhouLiYi2021}；在当前项目中，这些未建模的扰动不是逐一机械地建模，因此合理地将它们的组合效应视为输入依赖残差分布，其方差随工况和时间变化。 || 它是柴油喷雾穿深文献中使用的分阶段变化观点的降阶、数据驱动适应：Hiroyasu和Arai描述喷雾发展在不同阶段的穿深行为变化\cite{HiroyasuArai1990}，后来关于起始注入瞬态的工作表明，短注入很难用一个刚性经验表达式在整个轨迹上表示\cite{ZhouLiYi2021}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the claim that start-of-injection transients can deviate from a rigid classical penetration law during short pilot injections.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于说明短预喷中的起始注入瞬态会偏离单一经典穿深定律。

english_citation_sentences: When image formation contains multiplicative components, applying a logarithm converts multiplicative variations into additive ones, after which background subtraction and filtering become more stable \cite{OppenheimSchaferStockham1968,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || Gradient-magnitude operators such as Sobel filters are standard tools for emphasizing boundary transitions, while percentile scaling, automatic thresholding, and morphology are standard ways to stabilize segmentation under non-uniform contrast \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}. || The individual operators used here are standard image-processing primitives \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}; the engineering issue is that, once applied to terabyte-scale 12-bit video archives, their practical cost dominates the full workflow unless they are organized as bulk data-parallel computations. || This sequence is important for Mie videos because the raw intensity is not a direct measure of liquid volume fraction, and because the practical objective is stable geometry extraction under non-uniform illumination, glare, and background texture rather than exact optical inversion \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || The contribution is not the Sobel operator itself, which is classical, but its integration into a bulk video workflow that avoids repeated host-device copies and prepares every plume for the same downstream geometric treatment \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 这里的大多数操作——背景扣除、局部滤波、梯度计算、角度分箱、阈值化、形态学清理和累积分布计算——都会在大量独立像素、角度箱和帧上重复执行，因此它们不仅在图像处理上有明确依据，也天然适合张量化的 CUDA 并行实现 \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008,GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 在此基础上，对数域背景消除与前景构建借用了同态信号处理的基本动机：当图像形成过程含有乘性成分时，取对数可以把乘法扰动转为加性扰动，使后续背景扣除和滤波更稳定 \cite{OppenheimSchaferStockham1968,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 前景构建之后，Sobel 一类梯度幅值算子、百分位缩放、自动阈值和形态学操作依次增强并最终提取喷雾边界，同时压低弥散的低频背景结构 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}。 || 这个序列对Mie视频很重要，因为原始强度不是液体体积分数的直接度量，而且实际目标是在非均匀照明、眩光和背景纹理下稳定几何提取，而不是精确的光学反演\cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 这就是为什么实现的流程使用来自预注入统计的鲁棒背景估计，然后将表示转换为边缘主导的Sobel特征，其几何响应比原始亮度幅度更稳定\cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 贡献不是Sobel算子本身，这是经典的，而是将其集成到避免重复主机-设备复制的批量视频工作流中，为每个喷雾准备相同的下游几何处理\cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the image-processing choices: log-domain preprocessing, gradients, thresholding, morphology, and boundary extraction.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑对数预处理、梯度算子、阈值、形态学和边界提取等图像处理步骤。

title: Computer Vision: Algorithms and Applications

english_citation_sentences: Gradient-magnitude operators such as Sobel filters are standard tools for emphasizing boundary transitions, while percentile scaling, automatic thresholding, and morphology are standard ways to stabilize segmentation under non-uniform contrast \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}. || Likewise, the subsequent remapping stage follows standard inverse-warping theory, in which output pixels query source coordinates through an inverse transform so that the resampled strip is dense and free of forward-mapping holes \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}. || The individual operators used here are standard image-processing primitives \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}; the engineering issue is that, once applied to terabyte-scale 12-bit video archives, their practical cost dominates the full workflow unless they are organized as bulk data-parallel computations. || Once the spray is described on the angular axis, the repeated structure induced by the injector hole pattern becomes much easier to analyze, because plume occupancy can be summarized as a one-dimensional periodic signal rather than as fragmented edge content in the original image plane \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}. || The contribution is not the Sobel operator itself, which is classical, but its integration into a bulk video workflow that avoids repeated host-device copies and prepares every plume for the same downstream geometric treatment \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}. || Conceptually, this is a radial collapse of the 2D image into a 1D angular occupancy signal, which is a much more stable object for multihole alignment than raw edge fragments in the original frame \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}. || The FFT itself is standard; the contribution here is using the known injector multiplicity to turn the angular-density signal into an automatic plume registration rule \cite{CooleyTukey1965FFT,Szeliski2010Vision}. || This inverse-map formulation is computationally efficient and numerically clean, because every downstream plume metric is measured in the same local coordinate system \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 这里的大多数操作——背景扣除、局部滤波、梯度计算、角度分箱、阈值化、形态学清理和累积分布计算——都会在大量独立像素、角度箱和帧上重复执行，因此它们不仅在图像处理上有明确依据，也天然适合张量化的 CUDA 并行实现 \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008,GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 前景构建之后，Sobel 一类梯度幅值算子、百分位缩放、自动阈值和形态学操作依次增强并最终提取喷雾边界，同时压低弥散的低频背景结构 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}。 || 为此，工作流从笛卡尔图像坐标转向喷嘴中心极坐标，把二维重复结构折叠成角度轴上的一维占据信号，再利用孔数对应谐波的相位来估计旋转偏移 \cite{Szeliski2010Vision,CooleyTukey1965FFT}。 || 贡献不是Sobel算子本身，这是经典的，而是将其集成到避免重复主机-设备复制的批量视频工作流中，为每个喷雾准备相同的下游几何处理\cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 概念上，这是将2D图像径向坍缩为1D角度占用信号，这比原始帧中的边缘片段更稳定，用于多孔对齐\cite{Szeliski2010Vision}。 || FFT本身是标准的；这里的贡献是使用已知喷嘴多重性将角度密度信号转换为自动喷雾配准规则\cite{CooleyTukey1965FFT,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 这种逆映射公式计算效率高且数值清洗，因为每个下游喷雾度量都在相同的局部坐标系中测量\cite{Szeliski2010Vision}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports computer-vision operations such as polar resampling, inverse warping, image primitives, and geometric remapping.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑极坐标重采样、逆映射、图像处理原语和几何重映射等计算机视觉操作。

title: Liquid Penetration Length
english_citation_sentences: ECN guidance explicitly notes that liquid-penetration measurements are method-dependent and that optical boundaries should be interpreted as experimentally defined quantities rather than as direct access to a hidden physical ground truth \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}. || Throughout this workflow, the extracted boundary is interpreted as an optical liquid-envelope definition under the chosen diagnostic setup, not as a direct absolute truth of the in-cylinder liquid field \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration}. || Mie-scattering images do not provide a direct liquid-volume-fraction truth field; instead, they provide an optical boundary definition whose appearance depends on illumination, scattering, background, and post-processing choices \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}. || ECN benchmark studies confirm that non-reacting liquid penetration measured under controlled ambient conditions is reproducible across laboratories and correlates with the same governing parameters — ambient density, injection pressure, and nozzle geometry — that appear in engine-relevant scaling laws \cite{NaberSiebers1996,ecn_liquid_penetration}. || By testing nominally identical injectors (Spray~A and Spray~D) across multiple institutions, ECN found measurable inter-facility variation in liquid-penetration values and explicitly concluded that optically measured liquid boundaries should be understood as quantities defined by a particular measurement protocol, not as absolute ground-truth representations of the liquid phase \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory,MeijerECN2012}.
chinese_citation_sentences: ECN 的说明明确指出，液相穿深测量具有方法依赖性，光学边界应被理解为实验定义下的量，而不是隐藏真实物理场的直接真值 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}。 || 在整个流程中，提取出的边界始终被解释为所选诊断方法下的光学液相包络定义，而不是缸内液相场的绝对真值 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration}。 || Mie 散射图像并不提供液体体积分数的真值场，而是给出一种光学边界定义，其外观依赖照明、散射、背景和后处理选择 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}。 || ECN 基准研究证实，在受控环境舱条件下测量的非反应液相穿深可跨实验室复现，并且与发动机相关标度律中出现的相同支配参数——环境密度、喷射压力和喷嘴几何——高度相关 \cite{NaberSiebers1996,ecn_liquid_penetration}。 || ECN 通过在多个机构采用名义上相同的喷油器（Spray A 和 Spray D）进行对比实验，发现液相穿深的数值随测量方法和后处理定义的变化而存在可观测的差异；ECN 的文档明确指出，光学液相边界应被理解为特定测量定义下的量，而非绝对意义上的液相真值 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory,MeijerECN2012}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the ECN definition and method-dependence of liquid-penetration measurements.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑 ECN 对液相穿深定义及其方法依赖性的说明。
verification_notes: Saved public HTML page from https://ecn.sandia.gov/diesel-spray-combustion/experimental-diagnostics/liquid-penetration-length/

english_citation_sentences: High-fidelity simulations can provide richer internal flow information, but they require complex modeling choices, many input assumptions, and substantial computational effort \cite{liu2020sprayreview,peraza2022swi}. || On the modeling side, empirical correlations, phenomenological formulations, and CFD-based methods are commonly used to describe spray development \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,liu2020sprayreview}. || Empirical and phenomenological models are attractive because they are compact and interpretable, but their assumptions are often strongest under quasi-steady conditions and become less reliable under short-pulse, strongly transient, or multiple-injection cases \cite{liu2020sprayreview}. || Neural-network approaches have been used to map operating-condition parameters directly to spray tip penetration and cone angle without requiring a full CFD computation as an intermediate step, with several studies reporting prediction accuracy approaching 95\% \cite{VazKarathanasis2026,liu2020sprayreview}.

english_citation_sentences: If liquid fuel reaches the piston bowl or cylinder wall before forming a useful ignition kernel, wall wetting, deteriorated combustion, higher emissions, and lubricant dilution may follow \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution}. || High-fidelity simulations can provide richer internal flow information, but they require complex modeling choices, many input assumptions, and substantial computational effort \cite{liu2020sprayreview,peraza2022swi}. || At the same time, spray-wall interaction remains physically important and not fully resolved, particularly when one moves from laboratory diagnostics toward engine-relevant consequences such as wall film formation and reliability concerns \cite{peraza2022swi}. || If liquid fuel reaches the piston bowl or cylinder wall before evaporation or ignition, a fuel film forms on the surface, causing wall wetting, locally deteriorated mixing, elevated unburned-hydrocarbon emissions, and lubricant dilution \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || }\ conducted systematic measurements of spray impingement on a controlled-temperature flat wall using a single-hole ECN injector, characterizing how the penetration-to-wall-distance relationship varies with ambient density and temperature, thereby confirming the central role of penetration depth as the geometric input to impingement screening \cite{peraza2022swi}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 如果液态燃料在形成有效点火核之前就到达活塞顶或缸壁，则可能导致壁面润湿、燃烧恶化、排放升高以及机油稀释 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution}。 || 高保真仿真能够给出更丰富的内部流动信息，但它需要复杂的模型选择、大量输入假设和显著计算资源 \cite{liu2020sprayreview,peraza2022swi}。 || 与此同时，喷雾撞壁在物理上仍然重要且尚未被完全解析，尤其是在从实验室诊断走向发动机相关后果，如壁膜形成和可靠性问题时更是如此 \cite{peraza2022swi}。 || 若液态燃料在蒸发或点火之前到达活塞顶或缸壁，将在壁面形成燃料液膜，导致壁面润湿、局部混合恶化、未燃碳氢排放升高以及机油稀释 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || 在 ECN 框架下，Peraza 等人系统测量了单孔喷嘴在受控壁面温度下的喷雾撞壁行为，记录了穿深-壁距关系随环境密度和温度的变化规律，进一步确认了穿深作为撞壁筛查几何输入量的核心地位 \cite{peraza2022swi}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the physical importance of spray-wall interaction and penetration-to-wall-distance reasoning.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑喷雾撞壁问题的重要性，以及以穿深和壁距关系进行风险判断的思路。

english_citation_sentences: A deterministic multilayer perceptron is a reasonable first surrogate for penetration because it can map a small set of operating-condition features and time to a continuous trajectory \cite{BishopPRML2006}. || In regression terms, this corresponds to the conditional model \[ y=\mu(x,t)+\varepsilon(x,t),\qquad \varepsilon(x,t)\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^2(x,t)), \] which should be read here as a pragmatic statistical assumption rather than as a claim that the spray physics are literally Gaussian at every instant \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}. || In practice both directions give comparable results in this application, and forward KL was chosen for consistency with the negative log-likelihood training used in Stages 1 and 2 \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 确定性多层感知器是穿深的合理第一个代理，因为它可以将少量工况特征和时间映射到连续轨迹\cite{BishopPRML2006}。 || 在回归术语中，这对应于条件模型 \[ y=\mu(x,t)+\varepsilon(x,t),\qquad \varepsilon(x,t)\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^2(x,t)), \] 这里应被理解为实用的统计假设，而不是声称喷雾物理在每个瞬间都是真正的高斯\cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}。 || 在本论文中两种方向均给出相近结果，最终选择正向 KL 以与 Stage-1 和 Stage-2 的 NLL 训练保持一致 \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the regression, Gaussian likelihood, and probabilistic-learning assumptions behind the surrogate model.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑代理模型中的回归、高斯似然和概率学习假设。

title: What Uncertainties Do We Need in Bayesian Deep Learning for Computer Vision?
container: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30
english_citation_sentences: A model that returns only a conditional mean does not convey whether that mean is reliable for a specific condition, and for risk-screening purposes a calibrated predictive interval that can be interpreted alongside the geometric collision criterion is more informative than an overconfident point estimate \cite{KendallGal2017}. || Heteroscedastic Gaussian negative log likelihood is a standard way to let a network predict both a mean and an input-dependent variance \cite{KendallGal2017}. || In regression terms, this corresponds to the conditional model \[ y=\mu(x,t)+\varepsilon(x,t),\qquad \varepsilon(x,t)\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^2(x,t)), \] which should be read here as a pragmatic statistical assumption rather than as a claim that the spray physics are literally Gaussian at every instant \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}. || In practice both directions give comparable results in this application, and forward KL was chosen for consistency with the negative log-likelihood training used in Stages 1 and 2 \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 仅输出条件均值的模型无法告知该均值对特定工况是否可靠，而在风险筛查场景中，一个可以与几何碰撞准则并列解读的校准预测区间，比过度自信的点估计更具实际价值 \cite{KendallGal2017}。 || 异方差高斯负对数似然是一种标准方法，让网络预测均值和输入依赖方差\cite{KendallGal2017}。 || 在回归术语中，这对应于条件模型 \[ y=\mu(x,t)+\varepsilon(x,t),\qquad \varepsilon(x,t)\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^2(x,t)), \] 这里应被理解为实用的统计假设，而不是声称喷雾物理在每个瞬间都是真正的高斯\cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}。 || 在本论文中两种方向均给出相近结果，最终选择正向 KL 以与 Stage-1 和 Stage-2 的 NLL 训练保持一致 \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports heteroscedastic uncertainty estimation for input-dependent predictive variance.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑输入相关预测方差的异方差不确定性建模。
verification_notes: Downloaded legal open PDF from https://papers.nips.cc/paper_files/paper/2017/file/2650d6089a6d640c5e85b2b88265dc2b-Paper.pdf

title: Mixture Formation in Internal Combustion Engines

english_citation_sentences: In engineering practice, the most direct approach for impingement screening is to compare the liquid-phase spray-tip penetration $S_\mathrm{tip}(t)$ against the nozzle-to-wall distance $L_\mathrm{wall}$: impingement is flagged when $S_\mathrm{tip}(t) \geq L_\mathrm{wall}$ \cite{Baumgarten2006MixFormation}. || Baumgarten's systematic treatment of mixture formation in internal combustion engines identifies penetration correlations as the baseline tool for simplified spray trajectory description, and penetration-to-wall-distance comparison as the standard first-order impingement criterion \cite{Baumgarten2006MixFormation}.
